title.en: [ יחידה ] YECHIDAH : The Desert of Silence

en: The desert continued to be crossed.
The hot, dry wind wore against the skin little by little.
The lips had split long ago,
and the blood that had once broken through had already dried in place.
ko: 뜨겁고 건조한 바람은 피부를 조금씩 마모시킨다.
한 번 터져 흘렀던 피는 어느새 말라붙어 있었다.

en: With every breath, the inside of the throat dries as if being burned away.
The sun overhead heats existence like a great open flame.
Yet when night arrives,
the cold air pierces the body as though the heat of day had never existed.
ko: 숨을 들이쉴 때마다 목 안쪽은 타들어가는 듯 메말라 간다.
내려쬐는 태양은 마치 거대한 불길과 같이 존재를 달군다.
낮의 열기가 존재하지 않았던 것처럼 차가운 공기가 몸을 파고들었다.

en: The moonlight was strangely clear,
and the stars were far too bright.
So bright
that it almost seemed as though someone were looking down.
ko: 오히려 누군가 내려다보고 있는 듯한 착각이 들 정도로.

en: And so the walking continues without end.
Across the desert.
Beneath the burning day.
Beneath the freezing night.
Thirst and exhaustion fracture the flesh, yet the steps do not stop.
Onward.
Forward.
And forward again.
ko: 갈증과 피로는 육신에 균열을 내건만, 발걸음은 멈추지 않는다.

en: The sun seemed to have descended lower than before.
Light no longer shone.
It pressed down from above, a weight grinding into the flesh.
The sand beneath the feet had grown burning hot,
and the steps begin to lose their feeling.
Heat seeps into the inside of the head,
and the edges of thought slowly begin to blur.
ko: 태양은 이전보다도 낮게 내려와 있는 듯했다.
빛은 더 이상 비추는 것이 아니라,
발 아래의 모래는 뜨겁게 달아올라 있었고,

en: The field of vision begins to tremble.
Distant dunes rippled like waves,
and the border between sky and earth loosened faintly within the heat.
Even so, the body did not fall.
Only the two legs continue to move.
ko: 하늘과 땅의 경계는 열기 속에서 희미하게 풀려나갔다.

en: As though following a motion decided long ago.
Like a wound spring that knows nothing of stopping,
the steps moved forward again.
Just like that.
Everything grows distant beneath the burning light.
Thirst, pain, exhaustion—
all of it fades,
as though happening somewhere very far away.
ko: 이미 오래전에 정해진 움직임을 따라가는 것처럼.
뜨거운 빛 아래에서 모든 것이 멀어진다.
마치 아주 먼 곳에서 일어나는 일처럼 희미해진다.

en: What remains is heat, and sand.
...And still, the dying body moves forward.
Somewhere within it,
a resonance not yet formed into words slowly rises.
ko: 아직 말이 되지 못한 울림 하나가 천천히 떠오른다.

en: The resonance did not wait for an answer.
What had risen sank down once more,
and upon the sand, only hot breath and wind remained.
The chest rose and fell violently,
and consciousness seemed ready to break at any moment.
ko: 모래 위에는 뜨거운 숨과 바람만이 남았다.

en: And yet, strangely,
darkness did not come.
The eyes would not close,
and the body did not fall into the sand.
Still, the steps continued.
ko: 육신 또한 끝내 모래 위로 쓰러지지 않는다.
두 다리는 여전히 앞으로 나아가고 있었다.

en: Before long, the sun had begun to sink,
and the heat of day faded from the desert as though it had been a lie.
Cold night settled over the sand,
and a moonlight, strangely bright, hung in the sky.
Shadows stretched black across the dunes,
and only the sound of footsteps continued faintly beneath the cold light.
ko: 낮의 열기는 거짓이었던 것처럼 사막 위에서 식어간다.
기이할 정도로 밝은 달빛이 하늘에 걸렸다.
발걸음의 소리만이 차가운 빛 아래로 희미하게 이어진다.

en: The head lifts before one knows it.
Above, a round moon hangs in the sky.
Its light was too bright,
like a hole opened in the night.
How long had it been watched?
At some point,
a faint mist begins to drift slowly across the moonlight.
ko: 하늘에 떠 있는 것은 둥근 달.
희미한 안개가 달빛 위를 천천히 스쳐 지나간다.

en: The mist veils the moon,
then reveals it once more.
Veiling.
Revealing.
The blurred light trembled like the surface of water,
and the world beneath the moon slowly began to lose its shape.
ko: 달 아래의 세상 또한 조금씩 형태를 잃어간다.

en: The mist moves slowly on,
and the moonlight breaks apart between its folds.
The broken light leaves strange forms upon the sand,
and the forms blur and bend once more.
Yet some do not vanish.
ko: 부서진 빛은 모래 위에 기묘한 형상을 남기고,

en: Beneath the moonlight,
what draws the eye first?
ko: 가장 먼저 눈에 들어오는 것은 무엇인가?

mars.en: The tip of a crimson spear

en: The gaze settles upon a single form.
The hand reaches forward slowly,
and the fingertips pass over the moonlight as though brushing its surface.
Just before they touch—
The mist scatters.
The form disappears,
and the moonlight goes out with it.
The sky splits open.
Flame surges upward,
and ice drives down from above.
The two pillars collide.
Heat and cold rush in at once.
There is nowhere to flee.
Nor anywhere to turn the eyes.
The body trembles before them.
For a moment, a voice descends from the sky.
Fire burns away the boundary,
and ice gives the boundary form.
By what is the world sustained?
The voice disappears.
So does the fire.
So does the ice.
And silence remains.
The flame dies down,
and the ice slowly melts upon the sand.
Where the two pillars had collided,
not a sound remained.
Through the fissure in the broken sky,
a faint light was descending.
The light does not burn the eyes.
Rather.
Something long forgotten
quietly returns within it.
Not as something lost,
but as something finally recognized again.
The light does not disappear.
Even when the eyes turn away.
Even when the head is lowered.
It remains there still.
The steps come to a halt.
The sand still cools beneath the feet,
and the cold wind passes through the folds of the garment.
Yet all of it
begins to blur like something far away.
The head lowers.
Though the knees had not touched the sand,
what had already bowed was not the body.
Between the cracked lips,
not a word comes forth.
Again, a voice descends from the sky.
To obtain it,
what can be forsaken?
The light draws gradually nearer.
Rather—
the distance that had remained before it—
begins to disappear, little by little.
If that sublimity forgives thee,
canst thou forgive thyself?
ko: 만약 그것이, 그 숭고함이 그대를 용서한다면—

severity.en: The sin must first be beheld.

center.en: It will be received, wound and all.

benevolence.en: The knee shall bend before mercy
benevolence.ko: 자비 앞에 무릎은 절로 꿇릴 것이다.

en: The voice can no longer be heard.
Nor the answer.
At some point,
all of it had grown distant.
Yet among the things that had grown distant,
one very slender fissure remained.
The fissure did not shine.
Nor was it dark.
It was simply
open like an unseen door.
ko: 아주 가느다란 틈 하나가 남아 있었다.

en: The flame.
The ice.
The light.
One by one, they sink into silence.
What remains is stillness.
In the place where nothing seemed to remain,
something instead begins to fill the silence.
Without sound.
Without form.
Without name.
Fullness rises.
Without sound.
Without form.
Without name.
The sense that nothing is lacking anymore
slowly spreads through the stillness.
For a moment.
Everything scatters.
The sky.
The desert.
The light.
As though none of it had ever been there.
Again.
The small pool of tears.
Across the still surface,
a faint tremor begins to spread.
Nothing is reflected beneath the surface.
Not the sky.
Not the face.
Not the desert already crossed.
Only the faintest ripple
spreads outward from within.
Deeply.
Quietly.
The fingertips touch the water.
A ripple rises.
Along its spreading rings,
the pool, the earth, and the forms that still remained
begin quietly to scatter.
The ripple spreads outward,
and the edge of the pool quietly comes undone.
The sand.
The sky.
Every outline that still remained.
One by one, they sink beneath the water.
Nothing is reflected upon the surface anymore.
Only a very faint light
slowly spreads from the depths.
Quietly.
As though it had never been held from the beginning.
ko: 수면 위에는 더 이상 아무것도 비치지 않는다.
마치 처음부터 붙잡힌 적 없었다는 듯이.

en: Before the final ripple disappears.
It rises from the deepest place.
“No hand shall reach even the hem of my robe.”
ko: “그 누구도 내 옷자락조차 잡지 못할 것이다”

en: The crown is set upon the highest place,
and its weight flows into the deepest below.
Upon the empty center, nameless authority shall remain.
ko: 비어 있는 중심 위에 이름 없는 권위가 머무르리라.

en: Wisdom flows before form,
and possibility overflows before name.
The light that presses endlessly onward shall become its own path.
ko: 끝없이 밀려나는 빛은 스스로 길이 되리라.

en: The limit holds what would otherwise flow,
and silence gathers the scattered within darkness.
Beneath the closed boundary, understanding shall at last remain.
ko: 침묵은 흩어진 것을 어둠 안에 모은다.
닫힌 경계 아래에서 이해는 비로소 머무르리라.

en: Abundance flows beyond the boundary,
and mercy divides itself within the overflow.
What has been given shall spread into a wider name.
ko: 베풀어진 것은 더 넓은 이름으로 번져가리라.

en: The edge of the blade divides what shall remain from what shall fall away,
and the wound leaves the outline of what must be guarded.
The force that holds collapse at bay shall stand as a light of severance.
ko: 칼끝은 남을 것과 사라질 것을 가르고,
상처는 지켜야 할 것의 윤곽을 남긴다.
무너짐을 막는 힘은 절단의 빛으로 서리라.

en: Order seeks beauty,
and desire seeks beauty also.
Between them, the light shall remain as harmony.
ko: 그 사이의 빛은 끝내 조화로 머무르리라.

en: Longing rises before reason,
and the step moves forward before meaning.
The fire that does not cease shall remain as victory unto itself.
ko: 멈추지 않는 불길은 스스로 승리로 남으리라.

en: What is scattered remains within a name,
and what is spoken takes form within order.
Beneath the shell of language, unseen glory shall stand.
ko: 말해진 것은 질서 안에서 형태를 얻는다.
언어의 껍질 아래에 보이지 않는 영광이 서리라.

en: Dream flows beneath memory,
and moonlight reflects itself upon the water.
The visible world shall rise upon an unseen foundation.
ko: 보이는 세계는 보이지 않는 기초 위에 떠오르리라.

en: The kingdom stands in the lowest place,
and all things receive a body there.
The mark that remains at the end shall hold the place of beginning.
ko: 끝에 남은 표식은 다시 시작을 품으리라.

en: The flame flashes first within the highest silence,
and possibility, not yet scattered, reveals itself beneath the spark.
The light flowing from crown to wisdom shall become a path in the end.
ko: 불꽃은 가장 높은 침묵 속에서 먼저 번쩍이고,
아직 흩어지지 않은 가능성은 섬광 아래 스스로를 드러낸다.
왕관에서 지혜로 흐르는 빛은 끝내 길이 되리라.

en: Water receives the highest light and sinks into the deep,
and what is transparent conceals itself while letting every form pass through.
The silence flowing from crown to understanding shall become a mirror in the end.
ko: 물은 가장 높은 빛을 받아 깊은 곳으로 가라앉고,
투명한 것은 스스로를 감추며 모든 형상을 통과시킨다.
왕관에서 이해로 흐르는 침묵은 끝내 거울이 되리라.

en: The head turns scattered victory and glory toward a single direction,
and divided currents shall be joined again beneath a name.
ko: 머리는 흩어진 승리와 영광을 하나의 방향으로 돌리고,
서로 갈라진 흐름은 이름 아래 다시 이어지리라.

en: The mouth presses the inner light outward,
and what is spoken shall reveal what lies hidden between strength and mercy.
ko: 말해진 것은 힘과 자비 사이에 숨겨진 것을 밝히리라.

en: Breath passes between understanding and wisdom,
and the formless comes to know itself within that breathing.
The two divided lights shall form one world upon unseen air.
ko: 형태 없는 것은 그 호흡 안에서 서로를 알아본다.
나뉜 두 빛은 보이지 않는 공기 위에서 하나의 세계를 이루리라.

en: The hook binds beauty and victory fast together,
and the bound longing shall remain as an unbroken light.
ko: 갈고리는 아름다움과 승리를 단단히 이어 붙이고,
묶인 열망은 끊어지지 않는 빛으로 남으리라.

en: The goad arranges the scattered order beneath beauty once more,
and what has tilted shall find its place within adjustment.
ko: 채찍은 아름다움 아래 흩어진 질서를 다시 배열하고,
기울어진 것은 조정 속에서 제자리를 얻으리라.

en: The small hand sends the language of glory down beneath the foundation,
and unseen influence shall remain like a seed in the deep.
ko: 작은 손은 영광의 언어를 기초 아래로 흘려보내고,
보이지 않는 영향은 씨앗처럼 깊은 곳에 머무르리라.

name.ko: Intelligence of all the activities of the spiritual beings

en: Before what is closed, the door waits for impact,
and upon the opened way, one will shall pass toward the crown.
ko: 닫힌 곳 앞에서 문은 충돌을 기다리고,
열린 길 위로 하나의 의지가 왕관을 향해 지나가리라.

en: The camel carries the light of beauty toward the far reaches of wisdom,
and overflowing will shall find its own direction upon the road.
ko: 낙타는 아름다움의 빛을 지혜의 먼 곳으로 옮기고,
넘치는 의지는 길 위에서 스스로의 방향을 얻으리라.

en: The house raises a dwelling between beauty and understanding,
and what was divided shall take the form of reconciliation beneath one roof.
ko: 집은 아름다움과 이해 사이에 머무를 자리를 세우고,
갈라진 것은 한 지붕 아래에서 화해의 형태를 얻으리라.

en: The window opens quietly from beauty toward mercy,
and faith, revealed like breath, shall receive the overflowing light.
ko: 창은 아름다움에서 자비를 향해 조용히 열리고,
숨결처럼 드러난 믿음은 넘치는 빛을 받아들이리라.

en: The fish descends from beauty into the deep force below,
and sunken change shall leave behind an unmoving center.
ko: 물고기는 아름다움 아래의 깊은 힘으로 내려가고,
가라앉은 변화는 흔들리지 않는 중심을 남기리라.

en: The palm holds the light of beauty upon the foundation of dream,
and the grasped image shall take shape within the unseen world.
ko: 손바닥은 아름다움의 빛을 꿈의 기초 위에 붙들고,
쥐어진 형상은 보이지 않는 세계에서 모습을 얻으리라.

en: The fence raises a boundary of trial between kingdom and victory,
and what seeks to cross shall prove itself before the wall.
ko: 울타리는 왕국과 승리 사이에 시련의 경계를 세우고,
넘어서려는 것은 그 장벽 앞에서 스스로를 증명하리라.

en: The hidden thing coils upward from the low place of kingdom toward glory,
and the old form shall be born anew beneath the inner ember.
ko: 숨겨진 것은 왕국의 낮은 곳에서 영광을 향해 몸을 말고,
낡은 형상은 안쪽의 불씨 아래 새롭게 태어나리라.

en: The blade awakens the sleeping current between foundation and victory,
and from the place divided, movement shall rise again.
ko: 칼날은 기초와 승리 사이의 잠든 흐름을 깨우고,

en: The mark descends from foundation into kingdom and receives a body,
and the trace left at the end of nature shall hold another beginning.
ko: 표식은 기초에서 왕국으로 내려와 몸을 얻고,
자연의 끝에 남은 흔적은 다시 시작을 품으리라.

en: The pillar upholds the overflowing current between wisdom and mercy,
and expansion made flesh shall stand upon an axis that does not fall.
ko: 기둥은 지혜와 자비 사이에 넘치는 흐름을 지탱하고,
몸을 얻은 확장은 무너지지 않는 축 위에 서리라.

en: The eye gathers what is scattered between understanding and strength,
and the order seen from above shall collect the fragments within darkness.
ko: 눈은 이해와 힘 사이에서 흩어진 것을 끌어모으고,
내려다본 질서는 어둠 속의 조각들을 하나로 모으리라.

en: The current continues without boundary between mercy and victory,
and what returns without end shall remain as an unceasing cycle.
ko: 흐름은 자비와 승리 사이에서 경계 없이 이어지고,
끝없이 되돌아오는 것은 멈추지 않는 순환으로 남으리라.

en: The hook draws up what is hidden between strength and glory,
and what is revealed shall find its place beneath the hand of order.
ko: 낚시바늘은 힘과 영광 사이에서 숨은 것을 끌어올리고,
드러난 것은 질서의 손 아래 제자리를 얻으리라.

en: The crown divides itself between wisdom and understanding,
and the two divided lights shall stand as order beneath one sovereignty.
ko: 왕관은 지혜와 이해 사이에서 스스로를 나누고,
나뉜 두 빛은 하나의 주권 아래 질서로 서리라.

en: The light of the crown flows downward through the vessel of understanding,
and what has descended shall remain as order within beauty.
ko: 왕관의 빛은 이해의 그릇을 지나 아래로 흐르고,
하강한 것은 아름다움 속에서 질서로 머무르리라.

en: The light of the crown passes through wisdom and presses outward,
and what has flowed forth shall illuminate itself within beauty.
ko: 왕관의 빛은 지혜를 지나 밖으로 밀려나고,
흘러나온 것은 아름다움 속에서 스스로를 밝히리라.

en: Wisdom faces understanding, and understanding receives wisdom,
and the two divided currents shall take one form within beauty.
ko: 지혜는 이해를 마주하고, 이해는 지혜를 품으며,
나뉜 두 흐름은 아름다움 안에서 하나의 형상을 얻으리라.

en: Understanding gives birth to strength, and strength tests beauty,
and the hindered light shall remain as a severe path within endurance.
ko: 이해는 힘을 낳고, 힘은 아름다움을 시험하며,
가로막힌 빛은 견딤 속에서 엄격한 길로 남으리라.

en: Wisdom overflows into mercy, and mercy flows toward beauty,
and the given light shall become a wider path within one order.
ko: 지혜는 자비로 넘치고, 자비는 아름다움을 향해 흐르며,
베풀어진 빛은 하나의 질서 안에서 넓은 길이 되리라.

en: Strength divides mercy, and mercy reflects strength in return,
and the beauty between them shall stand upon the scales of judgment.
ko: 힘은 자비를 가르고, 자비는 힘을 다시 비추며,
그 사이의 아름다움은 심판의 저울 위에 서리라.

en: Strength descends beneath beauty into the order of glory,
and what is scattered shall be raised as one beneath the name of discipline.
ko: 힘은 아름다움 아래에서 영광의 질서로 낮아지고,
흩어진 것은 절제의 이름 아래 하나로 세워지리라.
자비는 아름다움을 지나 승리의 불길로 흐르고,
넘치는 빛은 열망 속에서 헌신의 형상을 얻으리라.

en: Mercy passes through beauty into the fire of victory,
and the overflowing light shall take the form of devotion within longing.
ko: 아름다움은 영광과 승리 사이에서 스스로를 나누고,
말해진 열망은 발현된 빛으로 형태를 얻으리라.

en: Beauty divides itself between glory and victory,
and the longing once spoken shall take form as expressed light.
ko: 아름다움은 영광의 언어를 지나 기초 아래로 내려가고,
말해진 빛은 보이지 않는 곳에서 형상으로 서리라.

en: Beauty seeps beneath the foundation through the longing of victory,
and the held light shall burn as desire within the depth of dream.
ko: 아름다움은 승리의 열망을 지나 기초 아래로 스며들고,
붙잡힌 빛은 꿈의 깊이에서 욕망으로 타오르리라.

en: Glory reflects victory, and victory sinks beneath the foundation,
and the two currents facing one another shall remain as reflection within dream.
ko: 영광은 승리를 비추고, 승리는 기초 아래로 가라앉으며,
서로를 마주한 두 흐름은 꿈속에서 반영으로 남으리라.

en: Glory condenses through the foundation into the low place of kingdom,
and what has been spoken shall receive a body and remain as manifestation.
ko: 영광은 기초를 지나 왕국의 낮은 곳으로 응축되고,
말해진 것은 끝내 몸을 얻어 현현으로 남으리라.

en: Victory descends through the foundation into the low place of kingdom,
and the longing that did not cease shall clothe itself in the path of flesh.
ko: 승리는 기초를 지나 왕국의 낮은 곳으로 내려오고,
멈추지 않은 열망은 끝내 육신의 길을 입으리라.
